posters.title: Tech Conference Branding
posters.author: Easy
posters.des: Create a bold branding concept for an upcoming developer conference, including posters and badges.
posters.idea: Use neon accents and isometric grid patterns to convey a 'future of tech' vibe.

posters.title: Organic Coffee Packaging
posters.author: Intermediate
posters.des: Design a series of packaging labels for a sustainable, fair-trade coffee company.
posters.idea: Combine earthy, muted tones with rough typography to emphasize the organic nature of the beans.

posters.title: Music Festival Poster Series
posters.author: Advanced
posters.des: Create a cohesive set of promotional posters for a 3-day summer indie music festival.
posters.idea: Utilize surreal collages and vibrant gradients to capture the energy of live music.
